privileged_info_summary: The task operates on three real US Supreme Court landmark cases: Brown v. Board of Education (347 U.S. 483, 1954), Miranda v. Arizona (384 U.S. 436, 1966), and Gideon v. Wainwright (372 U.S. 335, 1963). These are historical cases from official US Supreme Court records and are pre-injected into the Jurism database via inject_references.py. The tag count requirements (min 3, max 3) require the agent to tag exactly these three cases and no others with a new tag named 'Landmark Decision'.
